parameters.name: depthinterpolationmodel
parameters.label: Depth Interpolation Model
parameters.description: Depth Interpolation Model depthmodel – a menu to select how the width of line items changes by their distance from the camera.

parameters.name: inversedistanceexponent
parameters.label: Inverse Distance Exponent
parameters.description: When the Depth Interpolation Model is Inverse Distance, this determines how fast the widths/sizes decrease with distance. If it is set to 1 (default), the width goes down at the rate of 1/r. If it set

parameters.name: distancenear
parameters.label: Distance Near
parameters.description: Specifies a near plane with a certain distance from the camera.

parameters.name: distancefar
parameters.label: Distance Far
parameters.description: Specifies a far plane with a certain distance from the camera.

parameters.name: widthnear
parameters.label: Width Near
parameters.description: Specifies a fixed width value when the distance from camera is less than or equal to Distance Near. See the Summary of this operator for an explantion of the treatment of line width.

parameters.name: widthfar
parameters.label: Width Far
parameters.description: Specifies a fixed width value when the distance from the camera is equal or bigger than the Distance Far. Note when the Near-Far Range option is selected as the Depth Model, any point in between Dista

parameters.name: widthaffectedbyfov
parameters.label: Width Affected by FOV/OrthoWidth
parameters.description: With this off (default), looking at a rendered image of a certain resolution, a line of with w will always be the same # of pixels wide as you change the field-of-view or ortho width. With this parame

parameters.name: widthbias
parameters.label: Width Bias
parameters.description: Moves the S Curve’s bias backward or forward for width interpolation (only S Curve depth model).

parameters.name: widthsteepness
parameters.label: Width Steepness
parameters.description: Controls the steepness of the S Curve for width interpolation (only S Curve depth model). The higher the value of the steepness, you will notice more dramatic changes (higher slope) in the curve width

parameters.name: widthlinearize
parameters.label: Width Linearize
parameters.description: Control the amount of curvature in the curve for width interpolation (only S Curve depth model).

parameters.name: colorbias
parameters.label: Color Bias
parameters.description: Moves the S Curve’s bias backward or forward for color interpolation.

parameters.name: colorsteepness
parameters.label: Color Steepness
parameters.description: Controls the steepness of the S Curve for color interpolation.

parameters.name: colorlinearize
parameters.label: Color Linearize
parameters.description: Control the amount of curvature in the curve for color interpolation.

parameters.name: liftdirection
parameters.label: Lift Direction
parameters.description: If a line is being drawn on a polygon or its edge (the polygon being in another Geometry + shader), and you need to lift it off the surface to be fully visible, this specifies whether to displace the

parameters.name: liftscale
parameters.label: Lift Scale
parameters.description: For lines that are drawn on top of filled polygons or along their edges, they may be cut off because they are rendered in the same place. To make it look good, you want to lift the line toward the cam

parameters.name: numptsincircle
parameters.label: Num Points in Circle
parameters.description: When drawing Points in Circle ( ) mode, or drawing end-caps, or elbows between edges, this determines how many points you would draw in a full-circle arc to simulate a circular shape. The lower the nu

parameters.name: drawlines
parameters.label: Draw Lines
parameters.description: A toggle to draw the Line polygons.

parameters.name: linejointtype
parameters.label: Line Joint Type
parameters.description: A menu to select the joint type where two lines segments meet.

parameters.name: miterthreshold
parameters.label: Miter Threshold (deg)
parameters.description: Specifies a threshold value in degrees for the Miter joint which alters the joint shape to Bevel joint if the angle between each two lines segments is bigger than this value.

parameters.name: linestartcaptype
parameters.label: Line Start Cap Type
parameters.description: A menu to Specify the end cap type at the Line start. You can control the size of each end cap type in the Cap page.

parameters.name: lineendcaptype
parameters.label: Line End Cap Type
parameters.description: A menu to Specify the end cap type at the Line end.

parameters.name: linenearalpha
parameters.label: Line Near Alpha
parameters.description: Specifies the alpha value for the Line at the Distance Near plane and any location closer to camera.

parameters.name: specifylinefarcolor
parameters.label: Specify Line Far Color
parameters.description: A toggle to use the far color and interpolate the values between near and far color.

parameters.name: linefaralpha
parameters.label: Line Far Alpha
parameters.description: Specifies the alpha value for the Line at the Distance Far plane and beyond (farther from camera).

parameters.name: drawpoints
parameters.label: Draw Points
parameters.description: A toggle to draw the Points.

parameters.name: pointtype
parameters.label: Point Type
parameters.description: A menu to select the type.

parameters.name: pointsizemultiplier
parameters.label: Point Size Multiplier
parameters.description: Specifies a scale coefficient to the size of the . By default, the point radius size equals to the width at the point’s location from the camera.

parameters.name: pointnearalpha
parameters.label: Point Near Alpha
parameters.description: Specifies the alpha value for the at the Distance Near plane and any location closer to camera.

parameters.name: specifypointfarcolor
parameters.label: Specify Point Far Color
parameters.description: A toggle to use the far color and interpolate the values between near and far color.

parameters.name: pointfaralpha
parameters.label: Point Far Alpha
parameters.description: Specifies the alpha value for the at the Distance Far plane and beyond (farther from camera).

parameters.name: pointliftdirection
parameters.label: Point Lift Direction
parameters.description: A menu to select the the dirction to lift points.  See parameter Lift Direction.

parameters.name: pointliftscale
parameters.label: Point Lift Scale
parameters.description: see parameter Lift Scale.

parameters.name: drawvectors
parameters.label: Draw Vectors
parameters.description: A toggle to draw the Vectors at each point.

parameters.name: scale
parameters.label: Scale
parameters.description: A scale value which applies on the length of the Vector.

parameters.name: roundwidth
parameters.label: Round Width
parameters.description: Specifies a scale to the width of Round end caps.

parameters.name: roundheight
parameters.label: Round Height
parameters.description: Specifies a scale to the height of Round end caps.

parameters.name: squarewidth
parameters.label: Square Width
parameters.description: Specifies a scale to the width of Square end caps.

parameters.name: squareheight
parameters.label: Square Height
parameters.description: Specifies a scale to the height of Square end caps.

parameters.name: trianglewidth
parameters.label: Triangle Width
parameters.description: Specifies a scale to the width of Triangle end caps.

parameters.name: triangleheight
parameters.label: Triangle Height
parameters.description: Specifies a scale to the height of Triangle end caps.

parameters.name: arrowwidth
parameters.label: Arrow Width
parameters.description: Specifies a scale to the width of Arrow end caps.

parameters.name: arrowheight
parameters.label: Arrow Height
parameters.description: Specifies a scale to the height (from the base of arrow to the head) of Arrow end caps.

parameters.name: arrowtaillength
parameters.label: Arrow Tail Length
parameters.description: Specifies a scale to the tail length of Arrow end caps (the longer the tail the sharper it will look like).

parameters.name: endcapwidthmultiplier
parameters.label: End Cap Width Multiplier
parameters.description: Normally end caps are the same width as the line. This parameter lets you make the cap wider/narrower than the line.

parameters.name: endcapheightmultiplier
parameters.label: End Cap Height Multiplier
parameters.description: Normally the end caps extend farther than the end of the line by half of the width (making the end cap a half-circle, and similarly for square, triangular and arrow endcape). This parameter lets you p

parameters.name: startcappullback
parameters.label: Start Caps Pullback
parameters.description: By default (0), the start cap goes beyond the start point of the line so that the center of a circular startcap is right at the start point. Setting this to 1 makes the tip of the end cap positioned e

parameters.name: endcappullback
parameters.label: End Caps Pullback
parameters.description: By default (0), the end cap goes beyond the end point of the line so that the center of a circular endcap is right at the end point. Setting this to 1 makes the tip of the end cap positioned exactly a

parameters.name: dodeform
parameters.label: Deform
parameters.description: Enables deforms on this material.

parameters.name: deformdata
parameters.label: Get Bone Data:
parameters.description: Specifies where the deform bone data will be obtained.

parameters.name: targetsop
parameters.label: SOP with Capture Data
parameters.description: Specifies the that contains the deform capture attributes.

parameters.name: pcaptpath
parameters.label: pCaptPath Attrib
parameters.description: Specifies the name of the pCaptPath attribute to use. When your geometry has been put through a , the attributes will be split into names like pCaptPath0, pCaptPath1. You can only render 1 bone group

parameters.name: pcaptdata
parameters.label: pCaptData Attrib
parameters.description: Much like pCaptPath Attrib.

parameters.name: skelrootpath
parameters.label: Skeleton Root Path
parameters.description: Specifies the path to the where the root of the skeleton is located.

parameters.name: mat
parameters.label: MAT
parameters.description: When obtaining deform data from a or a Deform In , this is where that is specified.

parameters.name: blending
parameters.label: Blending (Transparency)
parameters.description: This toggle enables and disables blending. However see the wiki article .

parameters.name: srcblend
parameters.label: Source Color *
parameters.description: This value is multiplied by the color value of the pixel that is being written to the Color-Buffer (also know as the Source Color).

parameters.name: destblend
parameters.label: Destination Color *
parameters.description: This value is multiplied by the color value of the pixel currently in the Color-Buffer (also known as the Destination Color).

parameters.name: separatealphafunc
parameters.label: Separate Alpha Function
parameters.description: This toggle enables and disables separate blending options for the alpha values.

parameters.name: srcblenda
parameters.label: Source Alpha *
parameters.description: This value is multiplied by the alpha value of the pixel that is being written to the Color-Buffer (also know as the Source Alpha).

parameters.name: destblenda
parameters.label: Destination Alpha *
parameters.description: This value is multiplied by the alpha value of the pixel currently in the Color-Buffer (also known as the Destination Alpha).

parameters.name: postmultalpha
parameters.label: Post-Mult Color by Alpha
parameters.description: Multiplies the color by alpha after all other operations have taken place.

parameters.name: depthtest
parameters.label: Depth Test
parameters.description: Enables and disables the Depth-Test. If the depth-test is disabled, depths values aren't written to the Depth-Buffer.

parameters.name: depthfunc
parameters.label: Depth Test Function
parameters.description: The depth value of the pixel being drawn is compared to the depth value currently in the depth-buffer using this function. If the test passes then the pixel is drawn to the Buffer. If the test fails t

parameters.name: depthwriting
parameters.label: Write Depth Values
parameters.description: If Write Depth Values is on, pixels that pass the depth-test will write their depth value to the Depth-Buffer. If this isn't on then no changes will be made to the Depth-Buffer, regardless of if the p

parameters.name: alphatest
parameters.label: Discard Pixels Based on Alpha
parameters.description: This enables or disables the pixel alpha test.

parameters.name: alphafunc
parameters.label: Keep Pixels with Alpha
parameters.description: This menu works in conjunction with the Alpha Threshold parameter below in determining which pixels to keep based on their alpha value.

parameters.name: alphathreshold
parameters.label: Alpha Threshold
parameters.description: This value is what the pixel's alpha is compared to to determine if the pixel should be drawn. Pixels with alpha greater than the Alpha Threshold will be drawn. Pixels with alpha less than or equal to

parameters.name: wireframe
parameters.label: Wire Frame
parameters.description: Enables and disables wire-frame rendering with the option of OpenGL Tesselated or Topology based wireframes.

parameters.name: wirewidth
parameters.label: Line Width
parameters.description: This value is the width that the wires will be. This value is in pixels.

parameters.name: cullface
parameters.label: Cull Face
parameters.description: Selects which faces to render.

parameters.name: polygonoffset
parameters.label: Polygon Depth Offset
parameters.description: Turns on the polygon offset feature.

parameters.name: pointfarcolorb
parameters.label: Pointfarcolorb
parameters.description: Specifies the color value for the Point at the Distance Far plane and beyond (farther from camera).

parameters.name: vecdirattnorm
parameters.label: Vecdirattnorm
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: innersizeatt
parameters.label: Innersizeatt
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: vecfaralpha
parameters.label: Vecfaralpha
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.label: Vecstartcaptype
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: vecfarcolorb
parameters.label: Vecfarcolorb
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: vectaperstrength
parameters.label: Vectaperstrength
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: linenearcolorb
parameters.label: Linenearcolorb
parameters.description: Specifies the color value for the Line at the Distance Near plane and any location closer to camera.

parameters.name: vecendcaptype
parameters.label: Vecendcaptype
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: innerhueshift
parameters.label: Innerhueshift
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: pointnearcolorb
parameters.label: Pointnearcolorb
parameters.description: Specifies the color value for the Point at the Distance Near plane and any location closer to camera.

parameters.name: specifyvecfarcolor
parameters.label: Specifyvecfarcolor
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: innercolormult
parameters.label: Innercolormult
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: vecdircusattidx
parameters.label: Vecdircusattidx
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: vecnearalpha
parameters.label: Vecnearalpha
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: veclengatt
parameters.label: Veclengatt
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: vecwidthatt
parameters.label: Vecwidthatt
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: veccoloratt
parameters.label: Veccoloratt
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: vecnearcolorb
parameters.label: Vecnearcolorb
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: vecdiratttype
parameters.label: Vecdiratttype
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: linefarcolorb
parameters.label: Linefarcolorb
parameters.description: Specifies the color value for the Line at the Distance Far plane and beyond (farther from camera).

parameters.label: Vecdiratt
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

examples.label: Configure Width Near and Width Far
examples.code:
n = op('line1')
n.par.widthnear = 6
n.par.widthfar = 0.1
n.par.legacyalphabehavior = True
examples.description: Common settings from 18 real Derivative examples
